card.name: CW01 Surveillance Pigeon
card.text: Flying When this creature enters or dies, scry 1.

card.name: CW02 Capitol Guardian
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: CW03 Storied Idol
card.text: When this creature dies, create a 1/1 white Bard creature token with exalted. (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: CW04 Martyred Idol
card.text: When this creature dies, draw a card.

card.name: CW05 Silvershield Aerialist
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and "Equip {1}.")

card.name: CW06 Lakefront Siren
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) {1}, {T}: Tap target creature.

card.name: CW07 Shimmervale Scion
card.text: Flying Whenever an enchantment you control enters, you gain 2 life.

card.name: CW09 Clearsong Flautist
card.text: This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. l[-1]: Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. (Activate up to one loyalty ability each turn as a sorcery.)

card.name: CW10 Pious Summoner
card.text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, return target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: CW11 Silvershield Luminary
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gains lifelink until end of turn. Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CW12 Runebreak Trap
card.text: Runebreak Trap deals 4 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. If you control an enchantment, you gain 4 life.

card.name: CW13 The Visionary's Exile
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this Saga leaves the battlefield. II, III — You gain 2 life. ​

card.name: UW12 Titan's Valor
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1. Reflex {1}{W} ({1}{W}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. Sactifice the copy at the next end step. You may cast this from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: CW15 Righteous Purge
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Exile target artifact, creature, or enchantment.

card.name: UW07 loyal reanimator
card.text: This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. l[-2]: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. (Activate up to one loyalty ability per permanent each turn as a sorcery.)

card.name: UW11 Song of Courage
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and "Equip {1}.") II — Attach target Aura or Equipment you control to target creature you control. III — Target creature you control gains first strike and vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: CW14 Fearless Approach
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains first strike until end of turn. If it's attacking alone, draw a card.

card.name: CU01 Murkwater Scavenger
card.text: This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.

card.name: CU02 Skyseeker Raven
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: CU03 Persistent Paparazzo
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it.

card.name: CU04 Lateral Strategist
card.text: This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. l[-1]: Draw a card, then discard a card. (Activate up to one loyalty ability each turn as a sorcery.)

card.name: CU05 Watchful Neighbor
card.text: Vigilance Whenever another creature you control with base power 2 or less enters, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CU06 Runespark Tinkerer
card.text: Prowess When this creature enters, return up to one target instant or sorcery spell from your graveyard to the top of your library.

card.name: CU07 Aqueduct Agent
card.text: Prowess This creature enters with two loyalty counters on it. l[-1]: This creature can't be blocked this turn. (Activate up to one loyalty ability each turn as a sorcery.)

card.name: CU08 Evenflow Drake
card.text: Flying Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CU09 Into the Mist
card.text: Return target creature and each aura you own that's attached to it to their owners' hands.

card.name: CU10 Control the Narrative
card.text: Counter up to one target noncreature spell. Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: CU11 Experimental Augury
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: CU12 Clear Visions
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Scry 2. II, III — Draw a card. ​

card.name: CU13 Early Retirement
card.text: Flash Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a colorless Statue artifact creature with base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: CU14 Meddling Grasp
card.text: Choose one — • Target nonland permanent's owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library. • Draw two cards.

card.name: CU15 Monarch's Wings
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. Reflex {U} ({U}, Exile this card from your hand: Cast a copy of it without paying its mana cost. Sactifice the copy at the next end step. You may cast this from exile on a later turn.)

card.name: UU03 Shimmervale Infiltrator
card.text: This creature can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and enchantment creatures.

card.name: UU08 Song of Control
card.text: I — Draw a card, then discard a card. II — Tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. III — Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: CB01 Footlight Fiend
card.text: When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: CB02 Riotous Reactionary
card.text: When this creature dies, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment with "Equipped creature gets +1/+1" and "Equip {1}.")

card.name: CB03 Underhall Crawler
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: CB04 Sensational Reporter
card.text: Menace Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: CB05 Honored Hireling
card.text: Deathtouch {1}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 colorless Statue artifact creature token. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CB06 Runesnare Wyvern
card.text: Flying When this creature enters, mill three cards. As long as there is an enchantment card in your graveyard, this creature gets +2/+0.

card.name: CB07 Paranoid Prophet
card.text: Menace Whenever this creature attacks, you may sacrifice another creature or enchantment. If you do, scry 2.

card.name: CB08 Maverick Mortician
card.text: This creature enters with a loyalty counter on it. l[-1]: Return target creature card with power 2 or less from your graveyard to your hand. (Activate up to one loyalty ability each turn as a sorcery.)

card.text: When this creature enters, up to one target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CB10 Smear Campaign
card.text: Choose one — • Target opponent discards two cards. • Creatures your opponents control get -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: CB12 Decontextualize
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or enchantment. Draw two cards.

card.name: CB13 Splintered Thought
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. II, III — Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. ​

card.name: CB14 Murder
card.text: Destroy target creature.

card.name: CB15 Essence Sear
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast if there is an enchantment card in your graveyard. Destroy target creature.

card.name: CR13 Scavenger's Crest
card.text: Exalted (Whenever a creature you control attacks alone, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile the top card of your library. When you do, add one mana of any color. You may play the exiled card until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.text: Choose one — • Erase the Past deals 4 damage to target creature. If it would die this turn, exile it instead. • Exile target artifact.

card.text: Whenever this creature attacks alone, create a Treasure token.

card.name: UR04 Inspiring Speaker
card.text: Haste When this creature enters, you may put a loyalty counter on target creature you control. You may activate one of its loyalty abilities once this turn as though none of its loyalty abilities have been activated this turn.

card.text: You and target opponent each create a Treasure token. Gain control of target creature that player controls. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.

card.name: CG12 Call a Hit
card.text: Put a loyalty counter on target creature you control. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, untap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature gets +3/+2 and has reach. card.text: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: CG15 Nourishing Roots
card.text: Mill four cards. You may put a permanent card from among them into your hand. Then if there is an enchantment card in your graveyard, you gain 3 life.

card.name: UG10 Song of Unity
card.text: I — Distribute four loyalty counters among up to four target creatures. II — Creatures you control with loyalty counters on them get +2/+2 until end of turn. III — Remove any number of counters from among creatures you control. You gain 1 life for each counter removed this way.

card.name: UM01 Unimpeachable Image
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, untap enchanted creature. Enchanted creature has hexproof as long as it's untapped. card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, target player discards a card. When this creature dies, target player draws a card.

card.text: Vigilance Whenever an enchantment you control enters, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: RM01 Majesty
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, Impending 3—{W}{U} (If you cast this spell for its impending cost, it enters with three time counters and isn't a creature until the last is removed. At the beginning of your end step, remove a time counter from it.)

card.name: RM21 Sparkwright Animus
card.text: This creature enters with X loyalty counters on it. This creature gets +1/+1 for each loyalty counter on it. This creature has all loyalty abilities of other creatures you control.

card.name: Z_Archetypes VIS
card.text: {W}{U} Voltron {U}{B} Base power 2 or less {B}{R} Revolt {R}{G} Loyalty aggro (some go wide) {G}{W} Enchantress {W}{B} Aristocrats {U}{R} Modified {B}{G} enchantments in gy {R}{W} Attacks alone {G}{U} Loyalty proliferate

card.name: Z_Common Keyword Distribution VIS
card.text: CW Keyword Distribution: 3 Flying (different powers) 2 Vigilance 1 Lifelink (low power) 0.25 First strike 0.20 Double strike CU Keyword Distributions 3 Flying (different powers) 1.5 Vigilance 0.5 Ward N 0.5 Defender 0.5 Flash CB Keyword Distribution 2 Flying (different powers) 1.5 Menace 1.25 Deathtouch 1 Lifelink CR Keyword Distribution 1.5 Trample 1.5 Menace 1.5 Haste 1 Reach 0.25 First strike 0.20 Double strike CG Keyword Distribution 1.5 Vigilance 1.5 Trample 1.5 Reach 1 Deathtouch 0.5 Ward N 0.20 Haste

card.name: RM04 Silvercloak Strike
card.text: Exile target attacking creature. Its controller may put a creature card from their hand onto the battlefield tapped and attacking. At the beginning of the next end step, return that creature to its owner's hand and the exiled creature to the battlefield.

card.name: RM07 Fervor
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.) You may activate the loyalty abilities of creatures you control twice each turn rather than only once.

card.name: UM13 Charged Debate
card.text: Draw a card, then discard a card. When you discard a nonland card this way, Charged Debate deals X damage to target creature, where X the discarded card's mana value.

card.name: RM15
card.text: Whenever another creature you control dies, if it had counters on it, put its counters on up to one target creature you control.
